description: kerala.gov.in is the Government of Kerala’s web domain, hosting public information and digital services across departments and projects. Its subdomains include citizen-facing portals, data publishing sites, and some application endpoints used by state-run systems.
summary: kerala.gov.in publicly exposes a small developer-facing surface on subdomains: one Swagger-documented HTTP API at `pmkapi.kerala.gov.in`, an SMS submission HTTP form at `api.esms.kerala.gov.in`, plus public unauthenticated web data/search endpoints on `datahub.kerala.gov.in` and `eoffice.kerala.gov.in`; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
